message:
Add SeriesConstructor and DataFrameFromSeries conformance fixture operations

Introduce two new FixtureOperation variants -- SeriesConstructor and
DataFrameFromSeries -- to the fp-conformance harness. This includes:

- Serde rename/alias attributes for JSON fixture deserialization
- Operation name mappings and compatibility-contract row declarations
- run_fixture_operation match arms with full expected-value handling
  (Series, ErrorContains, ErrorAny) for both operations
- fixture_expected and capture_live_oracle_expected pattern additions
- Helper functions collect_constructor_series_payloads and
  execute_dataframe_from_series_fixture_operation
- Differential comparison (execute_and_compare_differential) match
  arms producing DriftRecord vectors for both new operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
